property.name: canvasScreenName
property.description-key: Name of the Canvas App screen to navigate to on row click (e.g., svt-sale-details).

property.name: tableKey
property.description-key: Optional override for table/profile selection (e.g., sales, manager, qaassign, qaview).

property.name: country
property.description-key: Global country context passed to SVT APIs (e.g., England, Welsh).

property.name: listYear
property.description-key: Global list year context passed to SVT APIs (e.g., 2026).

property.name: fxEnvironmentUrl
property.description-key: Canvas-provided Dataverse environment URL used to build hereditament links in Sale Record details (e.g., https://org.crm11.dynamics.com).

property.name: vmsBaseUrl
property.description-key: Base VMS URL used to build map hyperlinks in Sale Record details (e.g., https://geo-dev-vms-4x.voa.ns3n.corp.hmrc.gov.uk).

property.name: sharePointOptionsJson
property.description-key: Chunk 1: Compact JSON object of SharePoint choice options for sales particulars.

property.name: sharePointRecordsJson1
property.description-key: Chunk 2: First compact JSON array of SharePoint reference records.

property.name: sharePointRecordsJson2
property.description-key: Chunk 3: Second compact JSON array of SharePoint reference records.

property.name: customApiName
property.description-key: Name of the Dataverse Custom API used for search (e.g., voa_GetAllSalesRecord).

property.name: customApiType
property.description-key: Custom API operation type: function (GET) or action (POST).

property.name: metadataApiName
property.description-key: Name of the Dataverse Custom API used to fetch metadata (e.g., voa_SvtGetSalesMetadata).

property.name: metadataApiType
property.description-key: Custom API operation type for metadata: function (GET) or action (POST).

property.name: userContextApiName
property.description-key: Name of the Dataverse Custom API used to resolve SVT user persona and access context (e.g., voa_SvtGetUserContext).

property.name: userContextApiType
property.description-key: Custom API operation type for user context resolution: function (GET) or action (POST).

property.name: taskAssignmentApiName
property.description-key: Name of the Dataverse Custom API used to assign tasks (e.g., voa_SvtTaskAssignment).

property.name: taskAssignmentApiType
property.description-key: Custom API operation type for task assignment: function (GET) or action (POST).

property.name: submitQcRemarksApiName
property.description-key: Name of the Dataverse Custom API used to submit QC remarks and mark tasks as passed QC (e.g., voa_SvtSubmitQcRemarks).

property.name: submitQcRemarksApiType
property.description-key: Custom API operation type for submit QC remarks: function (GET) or action (POST).

property.name: viewSaleRecordApiName
property.description-key: Name of the Dataverse Custom API used to fetch sale details by ID (e.g., voa_GetViewSaleRecordById).

property.name: viewSaleRecordApiType
property.description-key: Custom API operation type for view sale record: function (GET) or action (POST).

property.name: auditLogsApiName
property.description-key: Name of the Dataverse Custom API used to fetch audit history (e.g., voa_SvtGetAuditLogs).

property.name: auditLogsApiType
property.description-key: Custom API operation type for audit logs: function (GET) or action (POST).

property.name: manualTaskCreationApiName
property.description-key: Name of the Dataverse Custom API used to create manual SVT tasks (e.g., voa_SvtManualTaskCreation).

property.name: manualTaskCreationApiType
property.description-key: Custom API operation type for manual task creation: function (GET) or action (POST).

property.name: modifyTaskApiName
property.description-key: Name of the Dataverse Custom API used to modify completed SVT tasks back to Assigned (e.g., voa_SvtModifyTask).

property.name: modifyTaskApiType
property.description-key: Custom API operation type for modify task: function (GET) or action (POST).

property.name: submitSalesVerificationApiName
property.description-key: Name of the Dataverse Custom API used to submit sales verification task updates (e.g., voa_SvtSubmitSalesVerification).

property.name: submitSalesVerificationApiType
property.description-key: Custom API operation type for submit sales verification: function (GET) or action (POST).

property.name: enablePcfViewSalesDetails
property.description-key: When enabled, row open emits actionType=viewSalePcf (for PCF-hosted details) instead of actionType=viewSale (Canvas custom page flow).

property.name: pageSize
property.description-key: PageSize description

property.name: serverDrivenThreshold
property.description-key: If total records exceeds this threshold, the control switches to server-driven paging.

property.name: columnDisplayNames
property.description-key: Enter a JSON object mapping dataset column names to display names. E.g. {"JobID":"Job Ref","UARN":"Unique Ref"}

property.name: columnConfig
property.description-key: JSON array configuring columns

property.name: searchTrigger
property.description-key: Updated on Search click to trigger a refresh.

property.name: allowColumnReorder
property.description-key: If true, users can drag to reorder columns

property.name: perfLogsEnabled
property.description-key: When on, control logs API and UI performance timings to the console.

property.name: debugConsole
property.description-key: When on, control logs detailed debug info (API requests/responses, SharePoint catalog, access resolution, validation) to the browser console.

property.name: selectedTaskId
property.description-key: SelectedTaskId description

property.name: selectedSaleId
property.description-key: SelectedSaleId description

property.name: saleDetails
property.description-key: Serialized sale details JSON

property.name: viewSalePending
property.description-key: True while the control fetches sale details for navigation.

property.name: actionType
property.description-key: Last action type (back/viewSale/viewSalePcf/viewQcLog/viewAuditHistory)

property.name: actionRequestId
property.description-key: Changes on each action to trigger OnChange

property.name: selectedTaskIdsJson
property.description-key: JSON array of selected Task IDs

property.name: selectedSaleIdsJson
property.description-key: JSON array of selected Sale IDs

property.name: selectedCount
property.description-key: Count of selected rows

property.name: backRequestId
property.description-key: Updated when the user presses the back button.
